introduction: SYNOPSISStudents Ae-ma and Kyung-ah are asked to do some survey works from their workplace which they go at with great enthusiasm. The beautiful Ae-ma is pursued by four of her housemates as well as by Keun-bae, son of a conglomerate owner, who Mi-ok has a crush on. Ae-ma's fiancee, Byung-tae, comes to Seoul from the country. He saves the changed Ae-ma from many crisis but she ignores him nonetheless. Meanwhile, a pregnant Mi-ok discovers that Keun-bae is a fake and is furious. She tries to commit suicide. Ae-ma and Kyung-ah disguise themselves as Japanese tourists and make trouble for Keun-bae. Mi-ok wants to raise her baby as a married woman so she marries Keun-bae and then divorces him. Ae-ma finally realizes the sincerity of Byung-tae. She changes her mind and goes to him.故事空姐，阿马拉和京畿道被要求从兼职工作报告，工作积极。室友的美丽之后是四人寄宿生的求偶，以及一个年轻人，第二代chaebol的大学入学率。来自该国的马的未婚妻情况反复挽救了叛逆的马，但被忽视。另一方面，怀孕的母亲因为知道她是一个假的大企业集团而试图怨恨自杀。室友伪装成日本女士的旅游者，并用绳索喂食。结婚结婚后，Miaok是一位未婚母亲和离婚，培养了一名婴儿。迟钝的，实现条件的真相，治愈心灵，接近条件。
